texto: Religion is a way to make order from chaos, and I think economics is not dissimilar. In religion and in economics, you're trying to figure out the way we perceive the world and move through it, and that's what I like to learn.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Stephen J. Dubner: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Religion is a way to make order from chaos, and I think economics is not dissimilar. In religion …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, world, economics pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de economics e chaos.
